episodes.title: Star Trek Legend Jeri Ryan Torches MAGA Brainwashing | Trek Politics Interview
episodes.description:
Recorded in 2023, Star Trek icon Jeri Ryan sits down with Mary Trump and Bob Cesca and sounds the alarm on MAGA brainwashing, cult politics, and America’s divide. A powerful conversation about propaganda, empathy, and the fight for a better future.

episodes.title: Trump Builds Personality Cult as Democracy Crumbles Part 2
episodes.description: Part 2 of Mary Trump and Ruth Ben Ghiat exposing how Donald Trump is remaking America in his image—renaming institutions, flooding culture with propaganda, and accelerating an authoritarian power grab. Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
